name: Wordly
description: Wordle-like game that does a dayly word guess and do random words.

name: Chess Local/Online
description: Play chess against a bot that runs in the browser. Also have the ability to play a game agaist a friend online.

name: Minecraft Image Converter
description: Turns an uploaded image into minecraft blocks. This is run compleately client side so images are not uploaded to a server.
